<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <base href="/">

            <title>SupaFuse</title>
    
    <meta name="viewport"
          content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
    <link rel="icon" type="image/x-icon" href="favicon/icon-144x144.png">
    <link rel="apple-touch-icon" href="favicon/icon-192x192.png">
    <link rel="manifest" href="manifest.json">
    <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes">
    <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style" content="black-translucent">
    <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-title" content="SupaFuse">

    <!-- Critical CSS - Inlined for instant FCP -->
    <style>
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; border-width: 0; border-style: solid; }
    html, body, #root { width: 100%; height: 100%; margin: 0; padding: 0; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; }
    body { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, sans-serif; line-height: 1.5; }
    #root { color: rgb(var(--be-foreground-base)); background-color: rgb(var(--be-background)); }
    .dark { color-scheme: dark; }
    </style>

    <!-- Performance: Preconnect to critical origins -->
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://cdn-supafuse-03.supafuse.com" crossorigin>
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://naijatastic.s3.eu-central-1.amazonaws.com" crossorigin>

    <!-- Performance: Preload LCP image (landing page hero) - WebP with JPG fallback -->
    <link rel="preload" as="image" href="images/landing/landing-header-bg.webp" type="image/webp" fetchpriority="high">

    <!-- Performance: DNS prefetch for external resources -->
    <link rel="dns-prefetch" href="https://i.scdn.co">
    <link rel="dns-prefetch" href="https://mosaic.scdn.co">
    <link rel="dns-prefetch" href="https://www.googletagmanager.com">

    <!-- Space Grotesk Font - async load (non-blocking LCP) + display=optional (no swap CLS) -->
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Space+Grotesk:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=optional" rel="stylesheet" media="print" onload="this.media='all'">
    <noscript><link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Space+Grotesk:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=optional" rel="stylesheet"></noscript>
    <meta name="theme-color"
          content="rgb(22 22 26)">

                
                        <!-- Google tag (gtag.js) -->
<script async src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/gtag/js?id=G-FKJ9Q8Q23X"></script>
<script>
  window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
  function gtag(){dataLayer.push(arguments);}
  gtag('js', new Date());

  gtag('config', 'G-FKJ9Q8Q23X');
</script>
            
            <!-- Google tag (gtag.js) - Deferred to not block FCP -->
        <script>
            window.addEventListener('load', function() {
                var script = document.createElement('script');
                script.src = 'https://www.googletagmanager.com/gtag/js?id=G-FKJ9Q8Q23X';
                script.async = true;
                document.head.appendChild(script);
                window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
                function gtag() { dataLayer.push(arguments); }
                gtag('js', new Date());
                gtag('config', 'G-FKJ9Q8Q23X');
            });
        </script>
    
    
    <style>
    .bg-slider-disabled\/60 {
        background-color: rgb(var(--be-foreground-base)/var(--be-divider-opacity)) !important;
    }

    .bg-slider-disabled {
        background-color: rgb(var(--be-primary)/var(--tw-bg-opacity)) !important;
    }
    </style>
</head>

<body>

<!-- Instant loading skeleton - shows before React loads -->
<style>
.initial-skeleton {
    padding: 20px;
    max-width: 1200px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    animation: skeleton-pulse 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;
}
.initial-skeleton .skeleton-bar {
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, #e0e0e0 25%, #f0f0f0 50%, #e0e0e0 75%);
    background-size: 200% 100%;
    border-radius: 4px;
    animation: skeleton-shimmer 1.5s infinite;
}
.initial-skeleton .skeleton-header { height: 60px; margin-bottom: 24px; }
.initial-skeleton .skeleton-title { height: 32px; width: 200px; margin-bottom: 24px; }
.initial-skeleton .skeleton-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(160px, 1fr)); gap: 20px; }
.initial-skeleton .skeleton-card { aspect-ratio: 1; border-radius: 8px; }
.initial-skeleton .skeleton-text { height: 16px; margin-top: 12px; width: 80%; }
.initial-skeleton .skeleton-text-sm { height: 14px; margin-top: 6px; width: 60%; }
@keyframes skeleton-shimmer {
    0% { background-position: 200% 0; }
    100% { background-position: -200% 0; }
}
@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
    .initial-skeleton .skeleton-bar { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #2a2a2a 25%, #3a3a3a 50%, #2a2a2a 75%); background-size: 200% 100%; }
}
.dark .initial-skeleton .skeleton-bar { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #2a2a2a 25%, #3a3a3a 50%, #2a2a2a 75%); background-size: 200% 100%; }
</style>

<div
    id="root"
    style="--be-foreground-base:240 240 240;--be-primary-light:102 255 178;--be-primary:70 125 45;--be-primary-dark:0 204 106;--be-on-primary:10 10 10;--be-background:36 38 41;--be-background-alt:22 22 26;--be-background-chip:66 68 74;--be-paper:36 38 41;--be-disabled-bg-opacity:12%;--be-disabled-fg-opacity:30%;--be-hover-opacity:8%;--be-focus-opacity:12%;--be-selected-opacity:16%;--be-text-main-opacity:100%;--be-text-muted-opacity:70%;--be-divider-opacity:12%"
    class="dark"
>
    <!-- This skeleton is replaced when React mounts -->
    <div class="initial-skeleton">
        <div class="skeleton-bar skeleton-header"></div>
        <div class="skeleton-bar skeleton-title"></div>
        <div class="skeleton-grid">
                        <div>
                <div class="skeleton-bar skeleton-card"></div>
                <div class="skeleton-bar skeleton-text"></div>
                <div class="skeleton-bar skeleton-text-sm"></div>
            </div>
                        <div>
                <div class="skeleton-bar skeleton-card"></div>
                <div class="skeleton-bar skeleton-text"></div>
                <div class="skeleton-bar skeleton-text-sm"></div>
            </div>
                        <div>
                <div class="skeleton-bar skeleton-card"></div>
                <div class="skeleton-bar skeleton-text"></div>
                <div class="skeleton-bar skeleton-text-sm"></div>
            </div>
                        <div>
                <div class="skeleton-bar skeleton-card"></div>
                <div class="skeleton-bar skeleton-text"></div>
                <div class="skeleton-bar skeleton-text-sm"></div>
            </div>
                        <div>
                <div class="skeleton-bar skeleton-card"></div>
                <div class="skeleton-bar skeleton-text"></div>
                <div class="skeleton-bar skeleton-text-sm"></div>
            </div>
                        <div>
                <div class="skeleton-bar skeleton-card"></div>
                <div class="skeleton-bar skeleton-text"></div>
                <div class="skeleton-bar skeleton-text-sm"></div>
            </div>
                        <div>
                <div class="skeleton-bar skeleton-card"></div>
                <div class="skeleton-bar skeleton-text"></div>
                <div class="skeleton-bar skeleton-text-sm"></div>
            </div>
                        <div>
                <div class="skeleton-bar skeleton-card"></div>
                <div class="skeleton-bar skeleton-text"></div>
                <div class="skeleton-bar skeleton-text-sm"></div>
            </div>
                        <div>
                <div class="skeleton-bar skeleton-card"></div>
                <div class="skeleton-bar skeleton-text"></div>
                <div class="skeleton-bar skeleton-text-sm"></div>
            </div>
                        <div>
                <div class="skeleton-bar skeleton-card"></div>
                <div class="skeleton-bar skeleton-text"></div>
                <div class="skeleton-bar skeleton-text-sm"></div>
            </div>
                        <div>
                <div class="skeleton-bar skeleton-card"></div>
                <div class="skeleton-bar skeleton-text"></div>
                <div class="skeleton-bar skeleton-text-sm"></div>
            </div>
                        <div>
                <div class="skeleton-bar skeleton-card"></div>
                <div class="skeleton-bar skeleton-text"></div>
                <div class="skeleton-bar skeleton-text-sm"></div>
            </div>
                    </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
    window.bootstrapData = "";
</script>

<script>
    // Defer localStorage writes to not block FCP
    (function() {
        var initStorage = function() {
            localStorage.setItem('playingAd', 'false');
            localStorage.setItem('runAd', 'false');
            localStorage.setItem('wasPlayingBefore', 'false');
        };
        if (window.requestIdleCallback) {
            requestIdleCallback(initStorage, {timeout: 100});
        } else {
            setTimeout(initStorage, 1);
        }
    })();
</script>

<link rel="preload" as="style" href="https://www.supafuse.com/build/assets/main-BrFTeyh-.css" /><link rel="modulepreload" href="https://www.supafuse.com/build/assets/main-DPcq3Q8b.js" /><link rel="modulepreload" href="https://www.supafuse.com/build/assets/vendor-DkS3d1ke.js" /><link rel="modulepreload" href="https://www.supafuse.com/build/assets/query-DFzVGLKA.js" /><link rel="modulepreload" href="https://www.supafuse.com/build/assets/ui-DAw3SH05.js" /><link rel="modulepreload" href="https://www.supafuse.com/build/assets/player-Cv8Ix5E7.js" /><link rel="stylesheet" href="https://www.supafuse.com/build/assets/main-BrFTeyh-.css" data-navigate-track="reload" /><script type="module" src="https://www.supafuse.com/build/assets/main-DPcq3Q8b.js" data-navigate-track="reload"></script>
